synthesis_text: COVID-19 is caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus, while the common cold and flu are caused by different viruses [node_c:0:b45f35f8]. COVID-19 can lead to serious complications and death, unlike the common cold or flu, which are generally milder illnesses [node_b:0:cc23953c]. Symptoms of COVID-19 can include loss of taste or smell, which is not typical for the common cold or flu [node_b:1:43969c1c]. COVID-19 has a longer incubation period of 2 to 14 days, compared to the common cold and flu [node_c:4:a31074ab]. Older adults and those with certain medical conditions are at higher risk for severe COVID-19 illness compared to the flu [node_b:4:347ab415].

COVID-19 is caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus, while the common cold and flu are caused by different viruses [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. Symptoms of COVID-19 can range from mild to severe, similar to the flu and common cold, making testing necessary for confirmation [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. COVID-19 can lead to serious complications, such as difficulty breathing and multisystem inflammatory syndrome in children, unlike typical colds [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]. Additionally, COVID-19 symptoms include loss of taste or smell, which are not common in the flu or common cold [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]. COVID-19 has a longer incubation period of 2 to 14 days, compared to the common cold and flu [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. Older adults and those with certain medical conditions are at higher risk for severe COVID-19 illness compared to the flu [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000].
